'''Ha'lathin''' was a [[Bimm (disambiguation)|Bimm]] poet.

An original manuscript by Ha'lathin could be found among the artworks in the yacht ''[[Imru Ootmian]]''. It had been a gift from the previous owner of the yacht to the then-current owner, [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
